import { authenticateToken, requireAdmin } from "../middlewares/authMiddleware.js";] map[explanation:Replace pool.query with db.query inside getAllRestaurants filePath:d:\Kì 6\SWP391\G4_Multi-Restaurant-Menu-Online-Ordering-Platform\backend\controllers\restaurantController.js newString:export const getAllRestaurants = async (req, res) => {
    try {
        const [rows] = await db.query(`
      SELECT 
        r.RestaurantID,
        r.Name AS restaurantName,
        r.Logo,
        r.Description,
        r.TaxCode,
        r.Website,

        u.FullName AS ownerName,
        u.Email AS ownerEmail,
        u.Phone AS ownerPhone,
        u.Status AS ownerStatus,

        COUNT(b.BranchID) AS branchCount
      FROM Restaurants r
      LEFT JOIN Users u ON r.OwnerUserID = u.UserID
      LEFT JOIN Branches b ON r.RestaurantID = b.RestaurantID
      GROUP BY r.RestaurantID
      ORDER BY r.RestaurantID DESC
    `);

        res.json(rows);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("getAllRestaurants error:", error);
        res.status(500).json({ message: "Server error" });
    }
}; oldString:export const getAllRestaurants = async (req, res) => {
    try {
        const [rows] = await pool.query(`
      SELECT 
        r.RestaurantID,
        r.Name AS restaurantName,
        r.Logo,
        r.Description,
        r.TaxCode,
        r.Website,

        u.FullName AS ownerName,
        u.Email AS ownerEmail,
        u.Phone AS ownerPhone,
        u.Status AS ownerStatus,

        COUNT(b.BranchID) AS branchCount
      FROM Restaurants r
      LEFT JOIN Users u ON r.OwnerUserID = u.UserID
      LEFT JOIN Branches b ON r.RestaurantID = b.RestaurantID
      GROUP BY r.RestaurantID
      ORDER BY r.RestaurantID DESC
    `);

        res.json(rows);
    } catch (error) {
        console.error("getAllRestaurants error:", error);
        res.status(500).json({ message: "Server error" });
    }
};]]
